Name: PvZ2_Prerelease_AF_P1

Updates.zh: 加入芦笋战机、旋转菠萝、电离红掌。

Updates.en: Added Battleplane, Transport Boat, Double-Cabin Aircraft, Lightning Gun, Imp Paratrooper, and Airborne Gargantuar.
Updates.zh: 加入战斗机、运兵艇、双舱飞机、闪电枪、伞兵小鬼，和飞行巨尸。

Updates.en: Added Aerial Fortress Levels. (by: 莱池-余垛)
Updates.zh: 加入云端堡垒关卡（作者：莱池-余垛）。

Updates.en: Added Recommended & Challenging Card Decks for Aerial Fortress levels.
Updates.zh: 为云端堡垒关卡加入挑战、推荐卡组。

Updates.en: **(What is displayed below will NOT be mentioned in the future)**
Updates.zh: **(以下提示将在下一版本中清除)**

Updates.en: **To unlock shovel feature, play through tutorial 3 again.**
Updates.zh: **解锁铲子功能，需要再通关一次教程 3。**

Updates.en: **To unlock currency feature, play through tutorial 4 again.**
Updates.zh: **解锁货币功能，需要再通关一次教程 4。**

Updates.en: **To unlock plantfood feature, play through egypt 1 again.**
Updates.zh: **解锁叶绿素功能，需要再通关一次神秘埃及 1。**

Updates.en: **To unlock almanac feature, play through egypt 2 again.**
Updates.zh: **解锁图鉴功能，需要再通关一次神秘埃及 2。**

Updates.en: **To unlock zengarden feature, play through egypt 5 again.**
Updates.zh: **解锁禅境花园功能，需要再通关一次神秘埃及 5。**

Updates.en: **To unlock store feature, play through egypt 6 again.**
Updates.zh: **解锁商店功能，需要再通关一次神秘埃及 6。**

NewFeatures: 加入芦笋战机、旋转菠萝、电离红掌。
加入战斗机、运兵艇、双舱飞机、闪电枪、伞兵小鬼，和飞行巨尸。
加入云端堡垒关卡（作者：莱池-余垛）。
为云端堡垒关卡加入挑战、推荐卡组。
**(以下提示将在下一版本中清除)**
**解锁铲子功能，需要再通关一次教程 3。**
**解锁货币功能，需要再通关一次教程 4。**
**解锁叶绿素功能，需要再通关一次神秘埃及 1。**
**解锁图鉴功能，需要再通关一次神秘埃及 2。**
**解锁禅境花园功能，需要再通关一次神秘埃及 5。**
**解锁商店功能，需要再通关一次神秘埃及 6。**
EnNewFeatures: Added Battleplane, Transport Boat, Double-Cabin Aircraft, Lightning Gun, Imp Paratrooper, and Airborne Gargantuar.
Added Aerial Fortress Levels. (by: 莱池-余垛)
Added Recommended & Challenging Card Decks for Aerial Fortress levels.
**(What is displayed below will NOT be mentioned in the future)**
**To unlock shovel feature, play through tutorial 3 again.**
**To unlock currency feature, play through tutorial 4 again.**
**To unlock plantfood feature, play through egypt 1 again.**
**To unlock almanac feature, play through egypt 2 again.**
**To unlock zengarden feature, play through egypt 5 again.**
**To unlock store feature, play through egypt 6 again.**
